text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Huh?! Wh-what was that just now?!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I don't know why, but I feel all warm deep inside
my chest...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: It's like I'm overflowing with energy!
